subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1914
subcodes.first_line: These are God-sent calamities for man so that people will grow repentant and contrite. However, these people are like children in the cradle, the more you rock them, the sleepier they get.
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع اینها زواجر است از جانب خداست تا سبب تذکر و تنبه ناس شود ولی این مردم مانند اطفال
subcodes.subjects: @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world, @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @idle fancies; lust and passion
